title: Just a few mods
description: Just a few mods that improve performance, and some useful features, like zoom.
body:
## What?  
Just a few mods that improve performance, and some useful features, like zoom and connected textures. Made for just having a vanilla like playtrough, or just explore a few maps with friends.  

## Why?   
There are a lot of modpacks out there, ones that completely focus on optimization and ones focussing on quality-of-life features. I tried making somthing in between those two, so if that is what you are searching for, look no further!

### Features:
- Easy multiplayer(essentials)
- Optimization
- Zoom
- Shaders(optional)
- Connected textures
- Recipe viewer(JEI)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

<details>
<summary>Included mods:</summary>
  
- Continuity
- YetAnotherConfigLib
- More Culling
- ImmediatelyFast
- Cloth Config API
- Sodium
- AppleSkin
- Fabric Language Kotlin
- Dynamic FPS
- Not Enough Animations
- Entity Culling
- Indium
- Fabric API
- Sodium Extra
- Iris Shaders
- Text Placeholder API
- Lithium
- Essenyial Mod
- Mod Menu
- Jade
- Just Enough Items
- Just Enough Recources
- FerriteCore
- Zoomify
- LambDynamicLights
- Reese's Sodium Options

</details>


<details>
<summary>Included Shaders:</summary>

- Complementary (Reimagined & Unbound)
- Rethinking voxels

</details>



-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
### Disclaimer: I do not own, participate or contribute in any of the featured projects.
